fields.label: Active Provider
fields.description: Choose the model provider this ERP assistant should use.

fields.label: Tool Choice Mode
fields.description: Leave blank unless you are using a custom proxy that needs a forced tool-call format.

fields.label: OpenAI Default Model
fields.description: Example: gpt-5 for OpenAI, or a provider-specific model id for compatible APIs.

fields.label: OpenAI Models
fields.description: List allowed models as comma-separated values or a JSON array.

fields.label: Anthropic Models
fields.description: List allowed models as comma-separated values or a JSON array.

fields.label: Anthropic Vision Model
fields.description: Optional model used when image inputs are attached.

fields.label: OpenAI API Key
fields.description: Required for OpenAI or OpenAI-compatible APIs such as NVIDIA Build.

fields.label: OpenAI Base URL
fields.description: Use https://api.openai.com for OpenAI, or a compatible endpoint base such as https://integrate.api.nvidia.com.

fields.label: OpenAI Responses Path
fields.description: Use /v1/responses for OpenAI. For NVIDIA/OpenAI-compatible APIs, set /v1/chat/completions.

fields.label: Enable Remote MCP Servers For OpenAI
fields.description: Turn this on only if you want OpenAI to call external MCP servers.

fields.label: OpenAI MCP Servers JSON
fields.description: Array of MCP tool specs. Leave empty unless OpenAI MCP is enabled.

fields.label: Anthropic API Key
fields.description: Required for direct Anthropic API use. For some local proxies, a placeholder value is acceptable.

fields.label: Anthropic Auth Token
fields.description: Optional bearer token for Anthropic-compatible proxies.

fields.label: Anthropic Base URL
fields.description: Use https://api.anthropic.com for Claude direct, or your local proxy URL.
